name: Echelon of the Fire Kings
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>襲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Combined Strike of the Flame Kings
desc: Special Summon 3 FIRE monsters (1 Beast, 1 Beast-Warrior, 1 Winged Beast), 1 each from your hand, Deck, and GY, but their effects are negated, also destroy them during the End Phase. You can banish this card from your GY; this turn, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when you Normal or Special Summon a "Fire King" monster(s). You can only use each effect of "Echelon of the Fire Kings" once per turn.
eff: Special Summon 3 FIRE monsters (1 Beast, 1 Beast-Warrior, 1 Winged Beast), 1 each from your hand, Deck, and GY, but their effects are negated, also destroy them during the End Phase. You can banish this card from your GY; this turn, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when you Normal or Special Summon a "Fire King" monster(s). You can only use each effect of "Echelon of the Fire Kings" once per turn.

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
